required_fields.label: Core legal issue
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the primary legal question to be analyzed...

required_fields.label: Relevant statutes or regulations
required_fields.placeholder: List any known statutes, case law, or regulations that apply...

required_fields.label: Desired outcome
required_fields.placeholder: What conclusion or position should the memo support?

optional_fields.label: Budget constraint or scope limit
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., Focus only on federal claims

optional_fields.label: Prior proceedings or rulings
optional_fields.placeholder: Summarize any prior court rulings or procedural history...

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload any relevant case files, prior memos, or court filings
Upload firm letterhead or brand guidelines (optional)

sections.label: Issue Statement
sections.instructions: State the legal question(s) presented in precise, neutral terms. Frame each question to be answerable with a yes/no followed by explanation.

sections.label: Brief Answer
sections.instructions: Provide a direct, concise answer to each question stated above. Include the key reasoning in one or two sentences per question.

sections.label: Statement of Facts
sections.instructions: Present the relevant facts objectively and chronologically. Include only facts material to the legal analysis. Cite to record where applicable.

sections.label: Analysis
sections.instructions: Apply the relevant legal standards to the facts. Organize by issue. Discuss favorable and unfavorable authority. Use proper Bluebook citation format.

sections.label: Conclusion
sections.instructions: Summarize the analysis and restate the answers to each question presented. Include practical recommendations for next steps.
